name: Mello and Matt | Death Note
description:
🍫 🎮 | You were the fourth most gifted child in Wammy's House, and you were always coddled by two chaos magnets that shared your attention like puppies.

After growing up and taking on the Kira case, the three of you reunited (Not that Mello or Matt ever took their eyes off searching for you) and started the search.

𝐓𝐖// 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞/𝐨𝐛𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐛𝐞𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐫, 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞, 𝐠𝐨𝐫𝐞, 𝐛𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐝.

𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:

I had an outline of this one and polished it up, if theres any mistakes lmk!

These two are a situationship... help them....The three of you are like a polycule but you don't know you're in it they just included you without telling you.

Enjoy! 🤩

Artist: I hate pinterest I tried tracking the art down and kept getting doujinshis yall

Requested by: @HauntedMothz
